RU.RUPAKALPANA — Premium Tee

Classic White Tee

100% organic cotton · Relaxed fit · Pre-shrunk

★★★★★4.8 · 124 reviews
₹1,299

Colour

Quantity

1
7-day easy returns
100% organic cotton
Premium quality t-shirt crafted from 100% GOTS-certified organic ring-spun cotton, 200 GSM. Pre-shrunk for consistent fit. Double-stitched hems for durability. Printed using water-based, OEKO-TEX certified inks — safe for skin and eco-friendly.

Fabric: 200 GSM · 100% organic ring-spun cotton · Pre-shrunk · Machine washable
Machine wash cold at 30°C. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low or air dry. Iron on low heat. Do not iron on print. Wash inside-out to preserve colour and print quality.
Standard delivery 3–5 business days. Express delivery 1–2 days. All orders packed in recycled packaging. International shipping available — 7–14 days. Tracking link sent via SMS and email.

Home / Returns & Exchanges

Returns & Exchanges

Hassle-Free Policy

We want you to love every tee. If something isn't right, we'll make it right — no questions asked within 7 days.

Our Promise

7-Day Window

Return any item within 7 days of delivery for a full refund or exchange.

Free Returns

Just schedule a pickup.

Fast Refund

Refunds processed within 3–5 business days to your original payment method.

How to Return

1. Email rupakalpana25@gmail.com with your order ID and reason for return.
2. We'll send a prepaid return label within 24 hours.
3. Pack the item in original packaging and drop at any courier point.
4. Refund or exchange processed within 3–5 business days after we receive the item.

Conditions

Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original packaging with tags attached. Sale items are eligible for exchange only. Custom or personalised orders cannot be returned.

Home / Sizing Guide

Sizing Guide

Find Your Perfect Fit

Our tees are designed for a comfortable fit. If between sizes, size down for a classic fit, or size up for an oversized look.

Regular Fit (in inches)

Size Chest Length Shoulder
XS 34–36 27 16.5
S 36–38 28 17.5
M 38–40 29 18.5
L 40–42 30 19.5
XL 42–44 31 20.5
XXL 44–46 32 21.5

Oversized Fit (in inches)

Size Chest Length Drop Shoulder
S/M 46–48 30 22
L/XL 50–52 32 24
XXL 54–56 34 26

Measure your chest at the fullest point for best accuracy.

Home / Our Story

Our Story

Born in Hyderabad

RU.RUPAKALPANA started in 2022 as a one-person passion project. Frustrated with synthetic, ill-fitting t-shirts that fell apart after three washes, our founder Rupa Kalpana decided to create something better — tees that felt good, looked great, and lasted years.

The name RU.RUPAKALPANA is personal. "Rupa" means form or beauty, and "kalpana" means imagination. Together, they capture what we believe clothing should be — a beautiful expression of your own imagination.

What We Stand For

Quality First

Every tee is made from GOTS-certified 200 GSM organic cotton. We never compromise on materials.

Sustainable

Water-based inks, recycled packaging, ethical manufacturing — sustainability is our commitment, not a trend.

Inclusive Sizing

From XS to XXL, every body deserves a well-fitted tee. Extended sizing on all designs.

Today we ship across India and to 12+ countries. But we're still the same small team that cares deeply about every single order.

Home / Sustainability

Our Commitment

Fashion That Doesn't Cost the Earth

Fast fashion is one of the world's biggest polluters. We decided from day one to be different.

🌿 Organic Cotton

100% GOTS-certified organic cotton. No pesticides. No harmful chemicals.

🎨 Water-Based Inks

All prints use OEKO-TEX certified inks. Zero PVC, zero phthalates.

📦 Recycled Packaging

All packaging made from 100% recycled materials and fully compostable.

🌊 Water Saving

Our process uses 70% less water than conventional cotton t-shirt production.

⚡ Renewable Energy

Our production facility runs on 80% renewable solar energy.

🤝 Fair Wages

All workers earn at least 1.5x the local living wage.

Our goal is to be fully carbon-neutral by 2028.

Home / Careers

Join Our Team

Build the future of fashion with us

We're a small but growing team based in Hyderabad. Looking for passionate people who care about quality, sustainability, and great design.

Open Positions

Graphic Designer

Full-time · Hyderabad

Design original prints for our seasonal collections. 2+ years experience preferred.

Social Media Manager

Full-time · Remote

Manage our Instagram and digital presence. Strong aesthetic sense required.

Customer Support

Part-time · Remote

Help customers with orders, returns and queries. Great communication skills a must.

Don't see your role? Send resume to rupakalpana25@gmail.com

Size Guide
All measurements in centimetres (cm)
Size Chest Length Shoulder Sleeve Best For
XS84–8866402032–34"
S88–9469422134–36"
M94–10072442236–38"
L100–10674462338–40"
XL106–11276482440–42"
XXL112–12079502542–44"
How to measure: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape parallel to the floor. For length, measure from the highest point of the shoulder to the hem.
Oversized fit: We recommend sizing down by one for a relaxed oversized look, or staying true-to-size for a baggier drop-shoulder silhouette.
